    AuxiliaryContract.hasFreeModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to the free part of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
    boolean
    FunctionalOperationContractImpl.hasFreeModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
     
    boolean
    OperationContract.hasFreeModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to a free clause of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is freely "strictly pure."
